markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on reporting to measure the partnership's impact and inform strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Reporting Cadence:** Weekly snapshots (sessions, AEO citations) and a deep-dive monthly report (due last week of month) will be delivered to support Relay's internal reporting cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
  - [**AEO Visibility:** Gavin will get immediate Scrunch access to analyze prompts and citations, addressing an urgent need for data Relay's current tools (Ahrefs) cannot provide.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Content strategy will shift to target growing Home Services businesses ($500k+ ARR, 2-50+ employees), a high-value segment where Relay can increase profit by \~20%.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [**Expansion Decision:** The January report will analyze current content performance to inform the Home Services expansion, evaluating whether to reallocate existing budget (20-30 articles/mo) or propose a new investment.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)

## Topics

### The Reporting Challenge

  - [**Goal:** Isolate the partnership's impact on organic traffic from other factors (podcast, paid search) to inform future investment.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [**Primary Metric:** Organic sessions, with a 2026 goal of **350k/month**.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Constraint:** Reports must align with Relay's internal memo cycle, which requires data by the first week of each month.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

### New Reporting Framework

  - [**Weekly Snapshot:**](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
      - [Organic sessions](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
      - [AEO visibility changes & citations](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
  - [**Monthly Deep-Dive (due last week of month):**](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
      - [Top-level summary against goals](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
      - [Organic traffic & keyword trends](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [Content performance analysis (standouts, underperformers)](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2150.0)
      - [Topic cluster analysis (which to lean into/cut)](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
      - [AEO visibility & prompt analysis](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
      - [Strategic recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)

### AEO Visibility Solution

  - [**Problem:** Relay's current tools (Ahrefs) provide only a daily snapshot, lacking the prompt and citation detail needed for leadership reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [**Interim Solution:** Bailey will grant Gavin immediate access to Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
  - [**Long-Term Solution:** GrowthX's new internal AEO tool, which offers more control and B2B-focused tagging, will be demoed and onboarded next week.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)

### Strategic Pivot: Home Services Vertical

  - [**Target Audience:** Growing Home Services businesses, not startups.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [**Audience Profile:**](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Revenue:** $500k+ ARR](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [**Workforce:** 2-50+ employees (including seasonal)](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [**Pain Point:** Financial complexity from growth (expense management, invoicing)](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [**Value Prop:** Relay can increase their profit by \~20% by organizing financial operations.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [**Scope:** This focus will be integrated into the existing content plan, using the 20-30 article/month range for specialization.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
      - [Grant Gavin immediate Scrunch access.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
      - [Record a pre-onboarding walkthrough of the new AEO tool for Gavin.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2449.0)
      - [Deliver the January report by the last week of the month, including a Q4 recap and analysis of topic cluster performance.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [**Dave & Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2209.0)
      - [Schedule a separate meeting to discuss Airtable workflow efficiencies.](https://fathom.video/share/az1cUu1LxCbALDzpFi5y9z2eo1s_i9dd?tab=summary&timestamp=2209.0)
